opinion.h: YRIBARNE v. SAN BERNARDINO COUNTY, 376 U.S. 783 (1964)
YRIBARNE v. COUNTY OF SAN BERNARDINO ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, FOURTH APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 811. Decided April 6, 1964.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Reported below: 218 Cal. App. 2d 369, 32 Cal. Rptr. 847.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
